gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Outstanding implementation. PowerShell module uses expert patterns (unary comma for collection preservation, strict mode, ordered dictionaries). Workflow handles concurrency and least-privilege correctly. Include-only matrix strategy ensures deterministic GHA behavior.
